world.title: Rescuers search rubble for survivors as Venezuela earthquakes kill at least 235
world.summary: At least 4,300 people have been injured after two seven-plus magnitude shallow quakes hit seconds apart.

world.title: Earthquake is devastating blow to Venezuela at time of uncertainty
world.summary: The twin quakes come less than six months after Venezuela's then-leader Nicolás Maduro was seized by US forces.

world.title: People flee as building collapses on Caracas outskirts
world.summary: The capital and its surrounding areas have seen some of the worst damage from the 7.2 and 7.5 quakes, which hit a minute apart.

world.title: UN pauses Strait of Hormuz evacuation plan after cargo ship attacked
world.summary: The ship was reportedly struck by an "unknown projectile" near Oman but no casualties were reported.

world.title: Women alleging rape and sexual assault in France call to abolish statute of limitations
world.summary: More than 50 women are calling for the abolition of the statute of limitations which they say has prevented them seeking justice.

tech.title: YouTube Shorts are getting even shorter with an update that lets you double the playback speed
tech.summary: YouTube Shorts is getting a makeover.

tech.title: Patronus AI lands $50M to build ‘digital worlds’ that stress-test AI agents
tech.summary: Agent-testing startup Patronus AI, founded by former Meta AI researchers, is experiencing nearly insatiable demand, its investor says.

tech.title: Xbox follows Apple with price increases
tech.summary: The company says the increases are being driven by rising memory and console storage prices, with costs more than 2.5x higher than previous levels.

tech.title: Polymarket says hackers stole users’ funds
tech.summary: The prediction market giant Polymarket said it's refunding users who had funds stolen due to a third-party breach.

tech.title: The White House is asking OpenAI to slow roll the release of its new model over safety concerns
tech.summary: OpenAI reportedly plans to share its newest model, GPT 5.6, with a select group of partners instead of with the broader public. The reason: the Trump administration told it to.

denmark.title: South Korea plans to train half a million drone pilots
denmark.summary: South Korea aims to train a large number of drone pilots, but the exact number is not specified.

denmark.title: Two people died in separate drowning incidents in North Jutland
denmark.summary: Two people lost their lives in separate drowning incidents in North Jutland, Denmark.

denmark.title: More than 300 people have died of Ebola in DR Congo
denmark.summary: The Ebola outbreak in DR Congo has claimed the lives of over 300 people, highlighting the severity of the crisis.

denmark.title: 23-year-old British TikTok influencer accused of murdering her partner in Dubai
denmark.summary: A 23-year-old British TikTok influencer is accused of murdering her partner in Dubai, with the influencer claiming self-defense.

denmark.title: Resistance heroine Jutta Graae honored with a statue
denmark.summary: Jutta Graae, a Danish resistance heroine, has been honored with a statue in recognition of her bravery and contributions to the resistance movement.

greece.title: Η κλιματική αλλαγή πυ από τον ακραίο καύσωνα στη δυκή Ευωπη
greece.summary: Η κλιματική αλλαγή ευθύνεται «αναμφισβήτητα» για την ένταση του καύσωνα που πλήττει τη δυκή Ευωπη, έχοντας ως συνεται τη του θα ήταν σχεδόν αδύνατο πριν από 50 χρόνια, σύμφωνα με τα συμπεράσλατα μελέτης τη

sports.title: Ολοκληρώνονται οι όμιλοι στο Παγκόσμιο με καθηυμερινό
sports.summary: Super ενισχυμένες αποδόσεις, promos, αποστολές και Mούντο Game στα καταστήματα Allwyn.

sports.title: Πώς ένας διπλός γάμος θα κατέληγε σε τραγωδία λόγω καύσωνα - Κατέρρεαν οι καλεσμένοι
sports.summary: Ήταν 26 Ιουνίου 1976 και η Βρετανία βρισκόταν στη δίνη ενός ιστορικού καύσωνα, με 15 συνεχόμενες ημέρες κατά τις οποίες η θερμοκρασία ξεπερνούσε τους 32 βαθμούς Κελσίου

sports.title: F1: Η Honda δεν περιμένει θαύματα σύντομα
sports.summary: Ο πρόεδρος του HRC, Κότζι Γουατανάμπε, παραδέχεται τις σοβαρές δυσκολίες, εληγεί τους λόγους της πτώσης και ζητά υποςπολονή για το πλάνο της Honda.
